forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 3b82f6
+description: One shared schema-driven CLI generator for all four CLIs (kanban-cli, sah/swissarmyhammer-cli, code-context-cli, shelltool-cli); split full (in-process, CLI-facing) vs slim (wire) schema so x-operation-schemas/x-operation-groups/x-forgiving-input/examples stop shipping over MCP tools/list on every prompt. Promote kanban-cli's cli_gen.rs into swissarmyhammer-operations as the shared generator. Dispatch (forgiving parse_input) unchanged.
+name: Schema-driven CLIs + slim MCP wire
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: 3b82f6
-description: One shared schema-driven CLI generator for all four CLIs (kanban-cli, sah/swissarmyhammer-cli, code-context-cli, shelltool-cli); split full (in-process, CLI-facing) vs slim (wire) schema so x-operation-schemas/x-operation-groups/x-forgiving-input/examples stop shipping over MCP tools/list on every prompt. Promote kanban-cli's cli_gen.rs into swissarmyhammer-operations as the shared generator. Dispatch (forgiving parse_input) unchanged.
-name: Schema-driven CLIs + slim MCP wire
